commit_scope: impl(042): project manager reset clears state test

local_validation.details: All 4 tests pass: test_reset_clears_state_file, test_reset_flag_removes_state_file, test_reset_noop_when_no_state_file, test_reset_uses_state_file_arg. pytest 4 passed in 1.51s.

ci_validation.details: All 4 project manager reset tests pass. Implementation verified in project_manager.py lines 1083-1084.

deploy_validation.details: Local validation complete. Implementation in api/scripts/project_manager.py --reset flag removes state file before run.

verification_scenarios.name: reset_clears_state_and_starts_from_index_0
verification_scenarios.setup: State file exists with backlog_index=7, phase='impl'
verification_scenarios.expected: Returns {'backlog_index': 0, 'phase': 'spec', ...}, state file does not exist
verification_scenarios.edge: If state file doesn't exist, load_state() still returns defaults without error

verification_scenarios.name: reset_flag_subprocess_dry_run
verification_scenarios.setup: State file at custom path with backlog_index=3, phase='impl'
verification_scenarios.edge: State file is deleted; if still present, backlog_index must be 0

verification_scenarios.name: reset_noop_when_no_state_file
verification_scenarios.edge: No crash when file missing — graceful no-op

verification_scenarios.name: reset_uses_state_file_arg_not_default
verification_scenarios.setup: Alternate state file with backlog_index=5, default STATE_FILE also exists
verification_scenarios.expected: alt_path deleted, DRY-RUN: backlog index=0 in stdout, default STATE_FILE unchanged
verification_scenarios.edge: Default state file must not be modified when --state-file is used

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: project_manager --reset clears state file; subsequent load_state() returns backlog_index=0 and phase='spec'. Supports --state-file for alternate path.
test_flows: project manager reset -> state file removed -> load_state() returns index=0 phase=spec
project manager reset --dry-run -> stdout DRY-RUN: backlog index=0 -> exit 0
project manager reset with no existing file -> no crash -> exit 0
project manager reset --state-file alt -> only alt file affected -> default unchanged
